Document:
# Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="0. Admins have final say" link="CarpmosiaRuleC0"] - [textlink="1. No Shock Content" link="CarpmosiaRuleC1"] - [textlink="2. Be inclusive" link="CarpmosiaRuleC2"] - [textlink="3. Build a community" link="CarpmosiaRuleC3"] - [textlink="4. Be over the age of 17" link="CarpmosiaRuleC4"] - [textlink="5. Don't abuse out of game methods of gaining advantages" link="CarpmosiaRuleC5"] - [textlink="6. Admin decisions stay private" link="CarpmosiaRuleC6"] - [textlink="7. No AI generative content" link="CarpmosiaRuleC7"]
